description: Minimalist notes CLI in TypeScript. Serves as a didactic example of Harness Engineering.

features.name: project_architecture_analysis
features.title: project architecture analysis
features.description: Analyze the current project structure and output in the ARCHITECTURE.md file
acceptance: The ARCHITECTURE.md file should be updated or created
The file should include all the relevant details about project architecture
The file should provide useful information to consult when applying changes in the project

features.name: add_bcrypt_backend
features.title: Add bcrypt backend
features.description: The bcrypt library has been deleted from the client project in /Documentos/euro-frontend. Now add bcrypt dependency and usage in the backend project
acceptance: The project should not have any build errors
All the hash logic should be moved to this project to keep the logic working
All the endpoints that use hash logic should be updated
The backend should handle the hash logic
The backend should now return the proper response to the client

features.name: add_bcrypt_for_room_service
features.title: Add bcrypt for room service and all the affected areas
features.description: Update the room service and all the affected areas to use bcrypt instead of plain text passwords
acceptance: The room service and all the affected areas should use bcrypt instead of plain text passwords
The room service and all the affected areas should not have any build errors
Unit tests should be updated to reflect the changes
ARCHITECTURE.md should be updated to reflect the changes

features.name: change_auth_p_variable_to_already_hashed
features.title: change the auth_p variable to an already hashed variable
features.description: Instead of storing the auth_p as plain text in .env, change it to an already hashed variable. The current env variable is just plain text, but it should be an already hashed variable using bcrypt. The variable will come from the frontend as plain text
acceptance: Instead of a string, the .env variable should contain a hashed string
The auth_p should be hashed using bcrypt
The backend should validate the auth_p env variable
Unit tests should be updated to reflect the changes
ARCHITECTURE.md should be updated to reflect the changes
